title: Blink Charging Advancing Fast Charging in Q1 2026
text: Blink Charging announced advancement of DC fast charging infrastructure with approval and construction of 136 charging stalls across 27 sites in Q1 2026. High-powered DCFC site at Vasa Fitness in Lafayette, Colorado offers 600kW total capacity with up to 360kW peak per stall. Approved pipeline includes geographically diverse locations in New Jersey, Maryland, Illinois, Pennsylvania, Florida, North Carolina, Colorado, and New York. Company emphasized strategic approach to deploying capital on quality sites with rigorous ROI hurdles. Service revenue of $13.3 million in Q1 2026 represented 25% growth year-over-year and 64% of total revenue. Capital deployment strategy focuses on sites that will drive long-term sustainable recurring revenue. Company expects to scale DC fast charging network to be primary growth driver for recurring revenue and improved unit economics.
